title: Cinematic Disaster Action Scene AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Disaster Action Scene AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic blockbuster disaster-action scene with dark-haired adult man in his 30s sprinting through rain-soaked downtown street canyon between glass high-rises while a high-rise facade explosion erupts behind them. Subject: dark-haired adult man in his 30s wears soaked black jacket, dark pants, and wet street shoes and sprints toward the camera mid-stride with a tense survival expression, sharp focus on the body and face despite the chaos. Scene: Set in rain-soaked downtown street canyon between glass high-rises, with wet reflective asphalt, rain spray, orange firelight, smoke, shattered concrete, glass, metal debris, and a crumpled dark sedan in the left foreground, a wrecked dark car in the right midground, and an overturned black SUV tilted upward on the right anchoring the street scale. Composition: Low-angle wide-lens street-canyon composition: runner large in the foreground center, explosion towering behind, exactly three damaged vehicles distributed left foreground, right midground, and right background, debris frozen in depth, wet road reflections leading the eye. Signature Elements: Massive high-rise explosion, exactly three damaged vehicles, rain-soaked downtown canyon, wet asphalt reflections, frozen debris, smoke volume, and a single runner escaping toward camera. Style: Cinematic photorealistic disaster-movie realism with ultra-detailed rain spray, volumetric smoke, flying debris, high contrast, intense survival pacing, and blockbuster action clarity. Color Palette: Desaturated blue-gray storm daylight with orange fire accents, black vehicle silhouettes, wet asphalt highlights, and cold urban concrete tones. Lighting: Overcast storm light mixed with orange firelight, reflected headlight streaks on rainwater, backlit smoke volume, and controlled highlights on the runner and debris. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Cinematic Disaster Action Scene Variant 01

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Photorealistic blockbuster disaster-action scene with adult emergency engineer with short dark hair sprinting through Cinematic photorealistic action scene on a rain-soaked downtown street canyon. while a ruptured office-tower explosion erupts behind them. Subject: adult emergency engineer with short dark hair wears rain-soaked navy utility jacket, dark cargo pants, and reflective safety strap and sprints toward the camera mid-stride with a tense survival expression, sharp focus on the body and face despite the chaos. Scene: Set in Cinematic photorealistic action scene on a rain-soaked downtown street canyon., with wet reflective asphalt, rain spray, orange firelight, smoke, shattered concrete, glass, metal debris, and a crushed black taxi at left, a smoking compact car at right midground, and an overturned dark SUV near the curb anchoring the street scale. Composition: Low-angle wide-lens street-canyon composition: runner large in the foreground center, explosion towering behind, exactly three damaged vehicles distributed left foreground, right midground, and right background, debris frozen in depth, wet road reflections leading the eye. Signature Elements: Massive high-rise explosion, exactly three damaged vehicles, rain-soaked downtown canyon, wet asphalt reflections, frozen debris, smoke volume, and a single runner escaping toward camera. Style: Cinematic photorealistic disaster-movie realism with ultra-detailed rain spray, volumetric smoke, flying debris, high contrast, intense survival pacing, and blockbuster action clarity. Color Palette: Desaturated blue-gray storm daylight with orange fire accents, black vehicle silhouettes, wet asphalt highlights, and cold urban concrete tones. Lighting: Overcast storm light mixed with orange firelight, reflected headlight streaks on rainwater, backlit smoke volume, and controlled highlights on the runner and debris. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

Scene: Set in rain-soaked downtown street canyon between glass high-rises, with wet reflective asphalt, rain spray, orange firelight, smoke, shattered concrete, glass, metal debris, and a crumpled dark sedan in the left foreground, a wrecked dark car in the right midground, and an overturned black SUV tilted upward on the right anchoring the street scale. Composition: Low-angle wide-lens street-canyon composition: runner large in the foreground center, explosion towering behind, exactly three damaged vehicles distributed left foreground, right midground, and right background, debris frozen in depth, wet road reflections leading the eye. Signature Elements: Massive high-rise explosion, exactly three damaged vehicles, rain-soaked downtown canyon, wet asphalt reflections, frozen debris, smoke volume, and a single runner escaping toward camera. Style: Cinematic photorealistic disaster-movie realism with ultra-detailed rain spray, volumetric smoke, flying debris, high contrast, intense survival pacing, and blockbuster action clarity. Color Palette: Desaturated blue-gray storm daylight with orange fire accents, black vehicle silhouettes, wet asphalt highlights, and cold urban concrete tones. Lighting: Overcast storm light mixed with orange firelight, reflected headlight streaks on rainwater, backlit smoke volume, and controlled highlights on the runner and debris. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
